properties.displayName: ERP - Service Principal Interactive Sign-In Detected
properties.description: Detects service principals being used for interactive sign-ins which may indicate stolen credentials or token abuse. Service principals should only authenticate via client credentials flow. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1528 - Steal Application Access Token.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where UserType == "servicePrincipal" 
    or ServicePrincipalName != ""
    or UserPrincipalName has "svc-"
    or UserPrincipalName has "service-"
    or UserPrincipalName has "app-"
| where ClientAppUsed has_any (
    "Browser",
    "Mobile Apps and Desktop clients"
)
| extend
    MITRETechnique = "T1528 - Steal Application Access Token",
    RiskLevel = "High"
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    ServicePrincipalName,
    AppDisplayName,
    ClientAppUsed,
    IPAddress,
    Location,
    ResultType,
    ResultDescription,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel
